creator: alexander@kojevnikov.com
text:
I checked ports that depend on multimedia/ffmpeg1. These ports compile
and install: audio/beets, audio/spek, multimedia/audacious-plugins,
multimedia/mlt, multimedia/vlc, multimedia/xbmc, net/serviio.

These two ports fail to compile: audio/cmus, multimedia/mplayer2. I'm
attaching patches that fix them.

In case of audio/cmus however, it fails with the in-tree version of
multimedia/ffmpeg1 as well *if* multimedia/ffmpeg is also installed.
My fix is somewhat hacky so feel free to ignore it and just notify the
audio/cmus maintainer.
